meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve no version control (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: The Freelancer's Guide to No Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to debug with AI, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to recover, iterate, and ship faster without traditional version control.
content.answer_block: Without version control, you're one 'undo' away from disaster. AI debugging solves this by creating snapshots of your logic, analyzing diffs, and generating recovery patches. By integrating Antigravity for automated state management and Claude Code for terminal-based reasoning, you transform messy codebases into stable, professional-grade production environments instantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen at 2 AM, the client’s deadline looming, and you just deleted the one function that made the entire app work. Without Git, you’re flying blind, praying that a ‘Ctrl+Z’ will save your reputation. It’s a high-stakes game of Russian roulette that professional freelancers can no longer afford to play.

But what if your editor could remember exactly where you went wrong and reconstruct the logic for you? By combining the architectural oversight of Antigravity with the raw, terminal-driven power of Claude Code, you can turn your debugging process into a systematic recovery operation. It’s time to stop fearing the deletion and start building with absolute, AI-verified certainty.

steps.title: Establish a Baseline State
steps.description: Before debugging, capture the current state of your project to ensure you can revert if the AI suggests a breaking change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory and create a structural snapshot of the core logic to serve as a baseline for my debugging session.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the error stack back to the specific line causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the logs provided and identify the exact dependency chain causing the runtime error.

steps.title: Simulate the Fix
steps.description: Before applying code, ask the AI to generate a dry-run patch to ensure it doesn't break external dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a non-destructive fix for the identified bug. Provide the patch in a format that preserves existing functionality.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'propose a fix for the bug in main.js, show me the diff before applying'

steps.title: Apply and Verify
steps.description: Execute the patch and immediately run a test suite to confirm the fix is stable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the verified patch and generate a summary of the changes made for my client documentation.

steps.title: Automated Documentation
steps.description: Generate a changelog entry to track your progress, compensating for the lack of Git commits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise changelog entry describing the bug fixed and the solution implemented for the client report.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'write a changelog entry for the recent fix'

pro_tips: Always pipe your terminal errors into a text file so the AI can read the full trace without formatting issues.
Use Claude Code's --context flag to force the AI to look at your entire directory structure, not just the single file you are editing.
Treat your Antigravity snapshots as 'virtual commits'—label them with timestamps and features for manual tracking.
Ask the AI to explain 'why' a bug occurred before fixing it to avoid repeating the same mistake in other modules.
Before closing your session, ask the AI to summarize all 'hidden' changes made to the codebase to ensure nothing was left in a broken state.
content.next_steps: Set up a recurring weekly audit using Claude Code to review your codebase for technical debt and potential future failure points.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to ship faster and work smarter than 99% of your competition. Don't let a lack of version control hold your freelance career back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
